summary: Added weighted rotation support to mode manager. Added optional `weight` field to `SingleRotationEntry` and `CompoundRotationEntry` interfaces (default 1). Implemented weighted random initial selection using cumulative weights and weighted cycling via an expanded pool array shuffled deterministically with the session PRNG. Assigned `weight: 2` to the three overhauled flagship modes (terrain/US-076, pointcloud/US-084, fractalgrowth/US-087) and the pointcloud+fractalgrowth compound mode. All other modes retain default weight 1. All 18 US-090 tests pass, full suite (2388 tests) passes, build succeeds.
